onboarding.title: Inviting with Wisdom
onboarding.subtitle: A short guide for sharing Islam in a clear, gentle and original voice.
onboarding.purpose: This guide is not for pressuring anyone, but for sharing with wisdom, setting a good example, knowing the other person, and saying the right word at the right time.
onboarding.point1: The most powerful invitation is to be a good example.
onboarding.point2: Not harsh or judgmental, but simple, respectful and welcoming.
onboarding.point3: Short, original content; verses and hadith are only referenced, never quoted at length.
onboarding.copyrightNote: The texts in this app are short, original educational pieces prepared by drawing on core Islamic sources and the referenced works. No book text has been copied verbatim.

home.intro: What goodness would you like to share today?
home.emptyRecents: You haven't read any topic yet.
home.emptyFavorites: You haven't added any favorites yet.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty: You have no favorite topics yet.
favorites.emptyHint: Tap the heart icon on a topic to add it to your favorites.

daily.title: Note of the Day
daily.subtitle: A short principle of dawah each day.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the app language. Your choice is saved on your device.

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsDesc: A reminder for the note of the day.
settings.aboutBody: Dawah Guide is an offline guide for those who wish to share Islam in a simple, wise and gentle voice. The content takes the form of short lessons, summaries, principles and sharing tips.
settings.sourcesIntro: The following works were consulted. Their texts are not shown in the app; the content has been rewritten in an original form.
settings.permissionNeeded: Notification permission was denied. Please enable it in your phone settings.

copyright.title: Copyright & Sources
copyright.body: The texts in this app are short, original educational pieces prepared by drawing on core Islamic sources and the referenced works. No book text has been copied verbatim.
copyright.shortNote: This content was prepared in an original form, drawing on core Islamic sources.

card.title: Share Card
card.screenshotHint: Tip: You can screenshot this card and share it.

share.cta: If you'd like to discover Islam in a simple, gentle way, our door is always open. 🤍

notif.title: Note of the Day 🌙
notif.body: Take a moment with today's short principle; if you wish, share it kindly.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: This content is for general information and guidance only; it is not a binding religious ruling (fatwa). For personal situations and disputed matters, please consult a qualified scholar.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for isn't here.
